2604.11626.title: RationalRewards: Reasoning Rewards Scale Visual Generation Both Training and Test Time
2604.11626.paper_summary: Most reward models for visual generation reduce rich human judgments to a single unexplained score, discarding the reasoning that underlies preference. We show that teaching reward models to produce explicit, multi-dimensional critiques before scoring transforms them from passive evaluators into active optimization tools, improving generators in two complementary ways: at training time, structured rationales provide interpretable, fine-grained rewards for reinforcement learning; at test time, a Generate-Critique-Refine loop turns critiques into targeted prompt revisions that improve outputs without any parameter updates. To train such a reward model without costly rationale annotations, we introduce Preference-Anchored Rationalization (PARROT), a principled framework that recovers high-quality rationales from readily available preference data through anchored generation, consistency filtering, and distillation. The resulting model, RationalRewards (8B), achieves state-of-the-art preference prediction among open-source reward models, competitive with Gemini-2.5-Pro, while using 10-20x less training data than comparable baselines. As an RL reward, it consistently improves text-to-image and image-editing generators beyond scalar alternatives. Most strikingly, its test-time critique-and-refine loop matches or exceeds RL-based fine-tuning on several benchmarks, suggesting that structured reasoning can unlock latent capabilities in existing generators that suboptimal prompts fail to elicit.
2604.11626.paper_summary_zh: 大多數視覺生成的獎勵模型將豐富的人類判斷簡化為單一的無法解釋的分數，忽略了偏好的根本推理。我們展示了教導獎勵模型在評分之前產生明確的多維批評，如何將它們從被動評估者轉變為主動優化工具，從而以兩種互補的方式改善生成器：在訓練期間，結構化的推理提供了可解釋的、細緻的獎勵以供強化學習使用；在測試期間，生成-批評-精煉循環將批評轉化為針對性的提示修訂，改善輸出而無需任何參數更新。為了在沒有昂貴的推理註釋的情況下訓練這樣的獎勵模型，我們引入了偏好錨定推理（PARROT），這是一個原則性框架，通過錨定生成、一致性過濾和蒸餾，從隨手可得的偏好數據中恢復高質量的推理。最終模型RationalRewards（8B）在開源獎勵模型中實現了最先進的偏好預測，與Gemini-2.5-Pro相媲美，同時使用的訓練數據比可比較的基準少10-20倍。作為一種強化學習獎勵，它在文本到圖像和圖像編輯生成器中持續超越標量替代方案。最引人注目的是，它的測試時批評和精煉循環在幾個基準上達到或超過基於強化學習的微調，這表明結構化推理可以釋放現有生成器中的潛在能力，而不理想的提示無法引發。
2604.11626.author: Haozhe Wang et.al.
2604.11626.authors: Haozhe Wang, Cong Wei, Weiming Ren, Jiaming Liu, Fangzhen Lin, Wenhu Chen
